description: Blind authoring test plan -- procedure for the 25-topic geometry mapping test (TC-08: do 8 geometries cover the design space), LLM-authored manifest validation (TC-04: geometries eliminate manual 3D positioning), and 15-scene-type sufficiency test (TC-01: 3-5 planes per geometry handle 90% of common scenes). Covers SC-02 (blind authoring validation -- LLM authors 5 manifests for 5 topics, 4/5 look correct).
notes: Tier 6 validation plan. Covers TC-01, TC-04, TC-08, SC-02. Spec complete: 4 test procedures, 25 topics, 15 scene types, 4-dimension scoring rubric, LLM prompt templates. Executable with currently verified geometries (stage, tunnel, canyon, flyover).
